summary: Recomputed release-manifest, inventory, and checksum layers from the live V28_7 repository tree.
Harmonized live-file and hashed-file accounting under one declared policy.
Regenerated named-NPC downstream reference layers from canonical NPC records.

Added conservative derived appearance only where explicit organizational attire or species/station cues supported it.
